title: [epic] Testing coverage uplift to 90% across desktop client
description: Consolidated parent issue for broad test coverage uplift across the desktop shell, adapter seam, Tauri runtime, and measurement gate. Scope includes functional and edge-case tests, coverage reporting, and a roadmap ledger in docs/roadmap.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend, adapter, and Rust runtime edge cases are covered; coverage reporting exists; remaining work is documented in docs/roadmap with beads issue references.

title: Results tab needs run history and downloadable formatted reports
description: Add run history to the Results tab and provide downloads for well-formatted reports. The current results surface lacks visible historical runs and report export/download controls.

title: Standalone engine must support self-contained audits and standard report generation
description: Connection tab expectations: the app should be able to run audits without an external dependency when packaged with the standalone engine. Add packaging and runtime support for bundled rules, result interpretation, test-run output parsing, and standard audit report generation.

title: Tabs buttons inert and need stronger tab interaction coverage
description: Buttons on workspace tabs are not behaving correctly. Collapse/expand controls can appear inert. Add focused regression tests for tab button behavior, state toggles, and visibility changes across tabs.

title: Add responsive tabbed shell with 800x600 default window
description: Implement viewport-aware layout defaults, switch the shell to horizontal tab navigation below the header, and set the initial desktop window size to 800x600.
acceptance_criteria: The app detects viewport size and adjusts panel density/layout accordingly; the initial Tauri window defaults to 800x600; the main panels are accessible through horizontal tabs below the header; behavior is covered by tests.

title: Stabilize backend readiness and loopback validation in release gate
description: The release lane now shows two related failure modes: loopback health checks can fail in some environments, and the real-backend integration cluster can time out waiting for readiness. Determine whether the failures are environmental or test assumptions, then make release validation deterministic again.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/release_validate.py completes end-to-end in this checkout, including backend readiness checks and loopback health validation, without environment-specific bind failures or readiness timeouts.

title: Publish documented GitHub release
description: Publish the GitHub release with operator notes, validation evidence, and companion dependency notes.
acceptance_criteria: A documented GitHub release exists; the notes include validation evidence and companion dependency requirements; the publication step is repeatable.

title: Push main and release tag
description: Push the validated desktop state and the release tag to the configured remote.
acceptance_criteria: main is pushed; the release tag is pushed; the remote reflects the validated local state.

title: Attach or create the origin remote
description: Provision the Git remote needed for publication so pushes and release automation have a target.
acceptance_criteria: A usable  remote exists for this checkout and is reachable from the local environment; if the remote is missing, publication stays blocked and the blocker is recorded.

title: Add explicit unauthorized and compatibility-mismatch UX
description: Surface remote auth failures and desktop-version mismatches as explicit operator guidance in the React shell.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthorized remote access and version mismatch states are visible to the operator with next-step guidance; these states are covered by tests; local and remote flows remain distinguishable.

title: Wire recon workflow into src/App.tsx
description: Add the operator-facing recon workflow to the React shell while keeping transport calls behind the desktop adapter boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Recon input, submission, and result rendering are available in the shell; no direct browser HTTP path is introduced; recon stays capability-gated.

title: Phase R2: Recon and remote-policy UX
description: Wire the remaining operator workflows into the React shell and surface remote auth and compatibility failures explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Recon workflow is available in the shell; unauthorized and compatibility mismatches are surfaced with actionable guidance; UI changes stay behind the desktop adapter boundary.

title: Phase R4: GitHub publication
description: Attach a real Git remote, push the release branch and tag, and publish the documented GitHub release.
acceptance_criteria: A usable origin remote exists; main and the release tag are pushed; the release notes include validation evidence and companion dependency notes.

title: Remaining backlog execution program
description: Execution tracker for the remaining open work after validation. R1 doc-refresh items are already present in the tree and are not tracked here.
acceptance_criteria: All tracked phase epics are closed or explicitly blocked; validation gates are recorded as child issues; publication is not attempted until the release gate passes.

title: Settings theme colors should use a responsive grid layout
description: Convert the theme colors section in Settings into a responsive grid. Keep the page layout adaptive so the color grid remains usable across laptop and desktop screen sizes.

title: Overview tab should summarize every tab and available options concisely
description: The Overview tab should explain every tab and the primary options in a concise, user-friendly format so operators can orient quickly without opening each panel.

title: Add responsive screen presets, Playwright coverage, and roadmap docs consolidation
description: Implement settings for standard laptop and desktop screen presets, keep the tabbed shell visible by panel, add a comprehensive Playwright test suite, and move planning/product/roadmap markdown under docs/roadmap.
acceptance_criteria: Settings expose standard laptop and desktop screen presets; tabbed shell hides inactive panels and keeps the active tab explicit; Playwright suite covers core navigation, settings, and a performance smoke; planning and roadmap markdown live under docs/roadmap with root references updated.

title: Update public docs and publish release
description: Refresh the public status and release markdown set for the current tabbed, viewport-aware desktop shell, then tag and publish a documented GitHub release.
acceptance_criteria: Updated changelog, architecture, README, CLI guide, contributing, security policy, and bill of materials; release tag created and GitHub release published; repo remains build- and test-validated.

title: Feature map: phase-to-capability execution matrix
description: Map the remaining backlog into executable phases: Phase R2 covers recon and remote-policy UX plus test and accessibility gates, Phase R3 covers release verification and packaging gates, and Phase R4 covers remote publication. R1 doc-refresh work is already satisfied in the repo and is intentionally excluded.
acceptance_criteria: Every remaining capability area has a home phase, validation gate, and implementation task; R2 is testable before R3, and R3 must pass before R4 begins.

title: Run package-grade release validation
description: Execute the release lane after recon work lands and confirm the package boundary stays green.
acceptance_criteria: The release lane passes; Tauri package validation is included; any regression is captured before publication starts.

title: Add automated accessibility scans with axe-core
description: Pin the latest axe-core CLI or axe.min.js and wire an automated accessibility scan gate into the desktop shell test lane.
acceptance_criteria: An automated accessibility scan runs against the shell surfaces; failures fail the gate; the chosen axe distribution is pinned and documented.

title: Add Vitest and Playwright coverage for recon and remote-policy UX
description: Install the frontend coverage reporter and add a browser-level smoke gate for the built shell. This closes the gap between unit assertions and a repeatable UI check for recon submission/result paths plus unauthorized and compatibility-mismatch states.
acceptance_criteria: Vitest coverage runs with a reporter configured in CI and enforces an 80% minimum for the frontend test surface; Playwright smoke verifies the built shell renders and exposes the recon and remote-policy flows; all checks stay behind the desktop adapter boundary.

title: Phase R3: Release verification and packaging gate
description: Confirm release-grade packaging and validation remain in the lane before publication work starts.
acceptance_criteria: The release lane exercises the Tauri package boundary; package validation evidence is recorded; any regression blocks publication.
